author: @rubartknas7075
text:
Thank you for sharing this moment-so so well deserved, both of you. Congrats from the Heart, dear Family Smith  ( yes , the whole family, as I have a good guess, that a nurturing  energy must somewhere be hidden backstage, who keeps you both healthy and energized, as you keep pumpin' the most amazing content for DIY-Fans on the whole network to an evergrowing fanbase). You made Youtube a very special place for me to go. I've been following your channel for years now, since when you showed the first super capacitor hints, graphene and chemistry tricks and I am loving your channel and how you developed it, in your innate honesty and integrity, soldiering on through all calamities FWG had to face and your wise decision to take the channel, make it more intimate and the content placed to a widely accessible area for lots of lots of  people, then by your brilliant deed of hauling Luke aboard , introducing him, giving him space and makin' this a prospering family YT-endeavour : in all a joyful adventure to watch spiced with an output rate, which I am absolutely amazed that it can be be done so consistently and high quality , always warmhearted and humble in speech and deed, and with this gentle,eloquent and  highly appreciated lovely british humour and style. You both are an honour to YT. Alll the best to you- 
  RMS-CHANNEL: VIVAT; CRESCAT, FLOREAT!    Greetings from Germany

author: @shiningirisheyes
text: sorry you tube has shadow banned and banned most the stuff i look at because they do not enhance and praise the  left ideoligy as  the new God  . One day when you step on the  wrong  toes all your channel can be dissapeared so best to look to back up  your channel on gab or bitchute or odysee or similar. Expess any idea like Einstien was wrong or  germans made the first a bomb or some such science which isnt the approved science and your gone seems to be the way with YT  . Maybe even supply a cheap battery for preppers and your gone . The system hates solutions that can take humans off the grid . There is no real knowing who  or what channel YT gets rid off as time progresses . The long term plans with YT  is all channels will be approved channels only everything from cooking to fishing with paid staff more  like TV channels . YT in time will be be some few thousand channels more like TV that have to follow the YT rules or else . The off beat channels like yours will be removed and only be allowed to be interviewed by other approved YT channels or have a time slot segment program on that YT approved  channel. That  will reduce the income dramatically or even zero it for channels like yours . Just so you know what is coming down the tracks . YT isnt there to be your friend but to control the media they approve of

author: @totherarf
text:
Well done All of you!
As you say, many try, most fail!
Some would say you play around with Batteries, Relays, SteamPunk Gadgetry, Magnatism and the like ... I say they are Wrong!
The one thing you DO play with, and have since before I subbed, is .......

..... The Grey Stuff!
Long may you continue to do so. Not for us, although we do benefit greatly from it, but because it is what makes you ............. ........... Well YOU! (not the singular you eather).




As someone once said ..... Cheers Mate!
